description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a rectangular fenced yard with stone pillars and wooden panels. The building features a flat roof with a prominent glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory on one side, and a paved stone path leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are smooth and white, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The yard is covered with a light tan surface, likely gravel or paving stones, and the fence encloses the entire property with a double gate at the front. The layout is open, with visible interior divisions for rooms and a central living area.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, glass sunroom, and a fenced yard with stone pillars and wooden panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stone path, and the double gate with the fence and pillars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass sunroom/conservatory and the length of the building along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glass sunroom prominently and the back section of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, side entrance, and the continuation of the fence and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass sunroom and scattered windows
